# Repatriate Service

> A specialist UK-based body repatriation and bereavement-abroad service, providing families with expert coordination of international repatriation of deceased British nationals from 26 countries.

## Service overview

Repatriate Service coordinates the return of deceased British nationals from abroad to the UK. Services include:

- Full body repatriation (from 26 countries)
- Cremation abroad and ashes transport guidance
- 24/7 emergency advisory service for families
- Document coordination and embassy liaison
- Travel insurance claim support

## Countries covered

### P1 countries (city-level guides)
Spain, France, Thailand, USA, Greece, Turkey, Portugal, Italy, India, Egypt

### P2 countries (country-level guides)
Australia, Germany, Cyprus, UAE (Dubai), Philippines, South Africa, Kenya, Canada, Brazil, Mexico, Morocco, Dominican Republic, Sri Lanka, Indonesia, Cambodia, Vietnam

## Service silos

- /repatriation-from-[country]/ — Country-level repatriation guides with costs, documentation, embassy contacts, hospital procedures
- /guides/ — Step-by-step first response guides for each country
- /cremation-transfer/ — Cremation abroad: decision guide for families considering local cremation rather than full repatriation
- /bringing-ashes-home/ — Dedicated transport guides for families who already have ashes and need to bring them to the UK: documents, airline rules, export permits, costs
- /embassy-contacts/ — British Embassy and Consulate contacts for all 26 countries, with FCDO emergency number and consular role guidance
- /faq/ — Direct answers to the most common questions families ask: costs, timelines, insurance, embalming, coroner process, burial permits
- /blog/ — In-depth guidance articles on repatriation costs, insurance tracing, religious requirements, legal processes, country-specific guides

## Key facts

- Available 24 hours a day, seven days a week
- No upfront cost for initial consultation
- Works with established local funeral directors in all 26 countries
- Fully YMYL-compliant content with source citations
- Based in the UK; serves British families globally

## Contact

Phone (24/7): Available on site
Web form: /free-advice/
